name: Murmur: Rhythm
additional_info: Pings all nearby Monsters, NPCﾃθ津つ｢ﾃδ｢ﾃ｢竄ｬﾅ｡ﾃつｬﾃδ｢ﾃ｢竄ｬﾅｾﾃつ｢s, and Players, through walls while gray-scaling your screen. Red = Low Health, Yellow = Moderate Health, Grey = Healthy.
desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables the user to perceive the subtle murmur emanating from all things. Press G while crouched.
